design_philosophy: Emergent Style: Depth, readability, modern aesthetics without empty spaces. Driven by high-contrast structural borders, deep shadows, and cinematic lighting to replace flat black voids.

surface_styles.tracing_beam: relative overflow-hidden border border-white/10 shadow-[0_0_15px_rgba(37,99,235,0.1)] hover:shadow-[0_0_25px_rgba(37,99,235,0.2)] transition-shadow duration-300

sections.instructions: Sticky glassmorphism header (z-50). Logo on left, nav links center, 'Start Project' primary CTA on right. Must not be fully transparent. Add pt-[80px] to main to prevent overlap.

sections.layout: Grid cols-1 md:grid-cols-2 gap-12 items-center. Left: Typography. Right: Hero visual.
sections.instructions: Massive H1 with tight tracking. Use the 'hero_bg' as a subtle background visual for the right column or behind the entire section with bg-black/50 overlay. Do not let the image overpower the text. Primary CTA 'Start Project' (solid), Secondary CTA 'Join as Builder' (outline/glass).

sections.layout: Mode A: Tetris Grid. md:grid-cols-12. Asymmetrical layout.
sections.instructions: Visualize the 'Submit -> Execute -> Ship' process. Avoid empty spaces by making every card functional. 'Submit' (col-span-4): Form UI mockup. 'Execute' (col-span-8): Hero card showing the 'terminal_code' image and animated code lines. 'Ship' (col-span-12 or 6): Show 'workflow_ship' image with launch metrics. Use 'tracing_beam' surface styles for cards.
Section for developers. Left: Image of developer coding with a glass overlay card showing tech stack icons. Right: H2 'Join as Builder', bullet points using JetBrains Mono, CTA 'Apply to Build'.

sections.layout: Centered content in a technical grid-bordered box.
sections.instructions: Grid Borders look (Technical variant). Expose the skeleton. High contrast text. Primary CTA to 'Start Project'. Use subtle glow behind the text.
Dark background (#020205) to contrast with body. Massive text 'Development OS' on top or bottom. Links in columns. Include 'data-testid' on all links.

motion_and_interactions.hover_states: Interactive elements must shift in brightness. Buttons get a subtle inner shadow or scale up. Cards translate-y-1 and increase border opacity.
motion_and_interactions.animations: Use Framer Motion for staggered entrance of Bento Grid items. Animated workflow demo should simulate typing code or a marquee of active terminal commands.

accessibility_and_testing.testing: MUST include data-testid on all buttons, nav links, and form inputs (e.g., 'start-project-hero-button', 'join-builder-cta').
accessibility_and_testing.contrast: Ensure text over images has sufficient contrast using text-shadow or gradient overlays. Focus states must have high contrast rings.

icons.style: Technical, minimal. Do not use solid filled icons unless for active states.
